meta.title: Carlos Armando Guerra — Industrial Control Electronic Engineer
meta.description: 30+ years optimizing industrial production lines. Thermoforming, BOPP, metallization, PP extrusion, energy efficiency.

brands.title: Industrial brands with proven hands-on experience
brands.desc: Operation, maintenance, troubleshooting and commissioning across lines and systems from the world's leading manufacturers.

projects.title: Representative technical intervention cases
projects.desc: Anonymized projects illustrating the type of intervention, technical scope and qualitative outcomes obtained on the plant floor.
projects.disclaimer: * Cases anonymized for confidentiality. Detailed metrics available under NDA.

results.title: Measurable impact on the plant
results.desc: Every intervention targets one or more hard business indicators: cost, time, quality and availability.

testimonials.title: Feedback from those who run the line
testimonials.desc: Anonymized testimonials from plant managers, maintenance leaders and technical directors I've worked with on the shop floor.
testimonials.disclaimer: * Testimonials paraphrased and anonymized for confidentiality. Verifiable references available on request.

timeline.title: Plant by plant, a technical journey
timeline.desc: A career built on the factory floor, in front of cabinets, extruders, thermoformers and BOPP lines.

faq.title: What working with me looks like
faq.desc: Direct answers to the most common questions from plant managers and technical directors before starting a project.

contact.title: Let's talk about your plant.
contact.desc: I take technical inquiries, audits, troubleshooting and optimization projects for plastics, BOPP and general manufacturing industries.

form.name: Name and company
form.message: Tell me about the project, plant or inquiry
